scope: Design and deploy three end-to-end agentic workflows covering order management, inventory tracking, and weekly operations reporting. Each workflow runs automatically on a defined trigger, requires no manual input once live, and integrates with the client existing tools. Deliverables include full documentation and a handover session.

deliverables.description: Order management workflow - automated order intake, confirmation, and status tracking
Inventory tracking workflow - real-time stock alerts and reorder triggers
Weekly operations report - auto-generated summary delivered every Monday
Team training session (2 hours) - how to monitor, adjust, and extend the workflows

assumptions: Client provides access to existing tools and systems by project start date. All required credentials and integrations are available within the first week.
